name: In Saint George UT, can I sue my employer for hearing loss or just workers comp?
description: Workers' comp only vs employer; sue third parties maybe.[4]

mainEntity.name: In Saint George UT, can I sue my employer for hearing loss or just workers comp?

acceptedAnswer.text: Workers' comp only vs employer; sue third parties maybe.[4]
acceptedAnswer.description: Workers' comp is exclusive remedy in Utah for job injuries like noise loss—no lawsuits against employer unless intentional misconduct.[1][6] Third-party suits possible if equipment maker at fault.[4] Key factors: File WC first via Labor Commission, gross negligence rare exception.[2] Pursue comp for medical/permanent disability.[1] Attorney checks third-party angles.[4]
